common.errorNetwork: Can't connect. Check your network and try again.

home.title: The flavours of Africa, delivered to you
home.subtitle: Home-cooked dishes made fresh the same day, delivered free anywhere in Montérégie.

closed.title: We're closed right now
closed.text: Feel free to browse the menu — ordering resumes when we reopen.

item1.title: 100% free delivery
item1.text: No delivery fee, ever. The price you see is the price you pay.

item2.title: Authentic cooking
item2.text: Traditional family recipes, cooked properly with no shortcuts.

item3.title: Fresh ingredients
item3.text: We shop every morning. Nothing frozen, nothing reheated.

item4.title: Delivered in 30-45 min
item4.text: Your meal leaves the kitchen the moment it's ready — still hot.

item5.title: Flexible payment
item5.text: Cash, Interac or card — you choose when it arrives.

item6.title: Live order tracking
item6.text: A tracking link shows your order's progress in real time.

reviews.title: What our customers say
reviews.subtitle: Hundreds of meals delivered across Montérégie

r1.text: Best poulet DG I've had since moving to Quebec. It tastes like someone's home kitchen.
r1.author: Aminata D.

r2.text: Ordered at 6pm, arrived 6:35pm, still piping hot. And delivery really is free.
r2.author: Marc-Olivier T.

r3.text: Generous portions and the spicing is spot on. This is our Friday night now.
r3.author: Sarah B.

menu.title: Our menu
menu.subtitle: Everything is cooked the same day. Free delivery, no minimum.

empty.title: No dish matches
empty.text: Try another keyword or remove a few filters.

noDishes.title: Menu coming soon
noDishes.text: No dishes published yet. Check back shortly!

loadError.title: Menu unavailable
loadError.text: We couldn't load the dishes right now.

cart.title: Your cart

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.text: Browse the menu and add your favourite dishes.

cart.minOrder: Minimum order is {{amount}}. You need {{missing}} more.

form.name: Full name
form.emailHint: We send your confirmation and tracking link here.
form.phoneHint: The driver calls you on arrival.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.postalOutOfZone: We don't deliver to that postal code yet.
errors.summary: Please fix the highlighted fields below.

emptyCart.title: Your cart is empty
emptyCart.text: Add at least one dish before ordering.

closed.title: We're not taking orders right now
closed.text: The restaurant is closed. Come back when we reopen to complete your order — your cart is saved.

failed.title: Submission failed
failed.text: Your order couldn't be saved. Check your connection and try again — nothing was charged.

loyalty.freeMealHint: Applies ${{amount}} off and uses one free meal.

success.title: Order confirmed!
success.text: Thank you {{name}}, we're cooking your meal.
success.emailSent: A confirmation is on its way to {{email}}. Check your spam folder as well.
success.emailFailed: Your order is saved, but the confirmation email couldn't be sent. Please note your order number.

tracking.title: Order tracking

stepsHint.preparing: Your meal is in the kitchen.

notFound.title: Order not found
notFound.text: This tracking link isn't valid. Check the link from your confirmation email.

tracking.help: Any question? Message us on WhatsApp.

errors.notEnabled: Google sign-in isn't enabled yet. (Firebase Console → Authentication → Google)
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain isn't authorized for sign-in. (Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains)
errors.popupBlocked: The sign-in window was blocked. Allow pop-ups for this site and try again.

loyalty.title: My rewards
loyalty.toNext: {{count}} more point(s) until your next free meal

orders.title: My orders
orders.empty: You don't have any orders yet.

referral.title: Refer your friends
referral.intro: Share your code: your friend gets ${{perk}} off their 1st order, and you earn a point for every referred friend delivered. {{threshold}} points = a free meal!

footer.tagline: Authentic African cuisine, delivered free across Montérégie.

login.title: Restaurant login
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage orders and the menu.
login.errorTooMany: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
login.resetSent: If this account exists, a reset email has just been sent. Check your spam folder too.

empty.title: No customers
empty.text: Customer accounts will appear here after the first sign-ups.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Here's how the restaurant is doing.

emptyFiltered.text: Change the filter to see other orders.

empty.title: No dishes
empty.text: Add your first dish using the form.

settings.title: Restaurant settings
settings.subtitle: These settings apply to the public site immediately.
settings.isOpenHint: Uncheck to pause ordering, even during opening hours.
settings.zoneHint: Served postal code prefixes, comma separated (e.g. H2X, H2J, H3B). Leave empty to deliver anywhere.

referral.title: Referrals & rewards
referral.enabledHint: Uncheck to hide referrals and free meals everywhere on the site.
referral.pointsForFreeMealHint: Number of successful referrals to unlock a free meal.
referral.welcomePerkHint: Discount for a new customer who came via a referral link.
referral.emailOnStatusHint: Emails the customer as the order progresses (mind the ~100/day quota).

stats.title: Statistics
stats.topDishesEmpty: Not enough orders yet to build a ranking.
